title: Create Drill Drain
description: Drill with ease! Drain fluids from your quarries with the drill drain attachment
body:
# Quarry with ease!

![Block and drill attachments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62605ac896c39ff4f8f8758f82038911684fb5d7.png)

Drill drains help you to create your tunnels and quarries without the common problem of flooding and without the need of expensive arrays of deployers, balanced at the cost of including the storage for the fluids (configurable).

![Drilling underwater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4764bf951f2accaa14c72b3294d10b1a95e92f41_0.webp)

They offer a more cost-reasonable solution than deployers, but in a balanced way due to the need for storage and handling.

# Please use Modrinth ❤️
Unlike CurseForge, Modrinth shares more with creators, is open source and is a more community driven platform, notably, it has no ties we are uncomfortable with. Mods will continue to be on Curseforge, but a portion of our revenue goes towards Medical Aid for Palestinians.
